title: antennaria intermedia
intro: Antennaria intermedia, also known as mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Antennaria intermedia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
